artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found one public Universidad Nacional de Colombia, Sede Bogotá PDF with directly usable Spanish-language recommendations for AI use in teaching, research, and extension. Course pages, repository theses/articles, journal-specific AI policies, and a related collective profile page were rejected or not used as direct claim evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Recomendaciones para el uso de la IA en actividades de docencia, investigación y extensión universitaria

artifacts.claimText: Universidad Nacional de Colombia, Sede Bogotá guidance recommends AI literacy, ethical and responsible use, reflective integration, clear disclosure of AI use, redesign of tasks and assessments, human supervision, critical reflection, transparency about consequences of misuse, and attention to data security and privacy for teaching activities.
artifacts.normalizedValue: teaching guidance recommends literacy, disclosure, assessment redesign, human supervision, misuse transparency, and data/privacy safeguards

artifacts.sourceTitle: Recomendaciones para el uso de la IA en actividades de docencia, investigación y extensión universitaria
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Recomendaciones para el uso de la IA en actividades de DOCENCIA: Capacitación y alfabetización en IA. Uso ético y responsable de la IA. Integración reflexiva de la IA. Declaración clara sobre el uso de la IA. Adaptación (rediseño) de tareas y evaluaciones. Monitoreo y supervisión humana. Observancia crítica y fomento del pensamiento reflexivo. Información transparente sobre consecuencias del mal uso. Seguridad de datos y privacidad.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Recommendations for AI use in teaching include AI literacy, ethical use, disclosure, assessment redesign, human supervision, misuse transparency, and data/privacy safeguards.

artifacts.claimText: Universidad Nacional de Colombia, Sede Bogotá guidance for research recommends transparent documentation and declaration of AI use, clear limits that do not attribute authorship to AI, prevention of plagiarism, respect for intellectual property, avoidance of indiscriminate use or AI as a ghost author, and human supervision rather than excessive automated dependence.
artifacts.normalizedValue: research guidance recommends AI-use disclosure, no AI authorship, plagiarism prevention, intellectual property respect, no ghost authorship, and human supervision

artifacts.sourceTitle: Recomendaciones para el uso de la IA en actividades de docencia, investigación y extensión universitaria
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Recomendaciones para el uso de la IA en actividades de INVESTIGACIÓN: Responsabilidad ética en el uso de la IA. Formación, capacitación y alfabetización en IA para investigadores. Límites claros-No atribución de autoría a la IA. Evitar dependencia excesiva de la IA y uso automatizado sin supervisión. Exposición transparente del uso: documentación y declaración del uso de la IA. Integridad académica- Prevención del plagio y respeto a la propiedad intelectual. No uso indiscriminado o como "autor fantasma".
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Research recommendations include ethical responsibility, clear limits with no AI authorship, supervised use, transparent documentation/declaration, plagiarism prevention, intellectual-property respect, and no ghost authorship.

artifacts.title: Universidad Nacional de Colombia staged AI policy source review
artifacts.summary: Staged review found one official Universidad Nacional de Colombia, Sede Bogotá PDF with Spanish-language recommendations for AI use in teaching, research, and extension. Three agent-reviewed claim candidates were prepared for teaching guidance, research integrity/attribution guidance, and privacy/data-handling guidance. The claims are not marked canonical and require downstream review before publication.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Evidence is limited to a Sede Bogotá recommendations PDF; no university-wide binding generative AI regulation was found in the searched official public sources.
The related viejIAs web page was not used as direct evidence because it is a collective profile page and contains unrelated spam content.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
